title: Accidental Commit on Wrong Branch
description: You committed three changes directly to `main` instead of your feature branch `feat/payments`. The commits don't belong on `main`. Move them to the right branch and leave `main` clean.
objective: The three misplaced commits must be reachable from `feat/payments` and must not be present in `main`'s history. `main` must be in the same state it was before the accidental commits. The working tree on `main` must be clean.
hints: `git log --oneline` on `main` will show you the commits to move.
`cherry-pick` can apply specific commits to another branch by SHA.
Once the commits are on the right branch, `git reset --hard <sha>` on `main` moves the branch pointer back.
